dolt_commit_diff table reports filtered working-set additions
assertions.query:
SELECT diff_type, from_pk, to_pk
						FROM dolt_diff('HEAD', 'WORKING', 'commit_diff_working_items');

assertions.scriptName: dolt_commit_diff table reports filtered working-set additions
assertions.query:
SELECT diff_type, from_pk, to_pk
							FROM dolt_commit_diff_commit_diff_working_items
							WHERE to_commit = 'WORKING'
								AND from_commit = HASHOF('main');
